title: bunchosia costaricensis
intro: Bunchosia costaricensis, also known as the Panama flower or Panama rose, is a flowering plant species in the family Malpighiaceae. It is native to Costa Rica and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, improving digestion, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Bunchosia costaricensis can be prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and it is also used in folk remedies to treat various ailments.
